meta.source: Leviathan Mission Pack + Leviathan Tournament Companion
meta.description: Leviathan Chapter Approved matched play — Secondary Missions, Gambits, tournament rules

missionSequence: Determine Mission (draw Deployment, Mission Rule, Primary Mission cards)
Deploy Armies (Defender first, alternate one at a time)

reservesRestrictions.maxUnitsInReserves: No more than half the number of units in army
reservesRestrictions.maxPointsInReserves: No more than half total points of army
reservesRestrictions.destroyedIfNotArrived: Any Reserves not on battlefield by end of round 3 count as destroyed (does not apply to units placed into Strategic Reserves during battle)

scoring.battleReadyBonus: 10VP if every model painted to Battle Ready standard (fully painted with detailed or textured base)

fixed.description: Remain active every battle round, can be achieved multiple times. Marked with Fixed Mission symbol
fixed.cannotDiscard: Fixed Mission cards cannot be discarded for any reason
fixed.remaining: Remainder of Secondary Mission deck not used

tactical.description: Draw cards at start of Command phase — discard once achieved
tactical.drawing: Draw cards at start of Command phase if fewer than 2 active. Can spend CP on New Orders Stratagem
tactical.discarding: Can discard active cards at end of your turn — gain 1CP if it is your turn
tactical.deckEmpty: Cannot generate additional Secondary Missions if deck runs out

NEW_ORDERS.target: One of your active Secondary Mission cards
NEW_ORDERS.effect: Discard it and draw one new Secondary Mission card

cards.EXTEND_BATTLE_LINES: 5VP — end of your turn: control objective in own deployment zone AND objective in No Man's Land. If only 1 unit remaining: 2VP for controlling 1 objective in No Man's Land
cards.BEHIND_ENEMY_LINES: 4VP (Fixed) or 5VP (Tactical) — 2+ units wholly within opponent's deployment zone. 3VP if only 1 unit
cards.ASSASSINATION: 4VP per CHARACTER destroyed (Fixed) or 5VP at end of turn (Tactical) if CHARACTER destroyed or all enemy CHARACTERs destroyed during battle
cards.BRING_IT_DOWN: 2VP per MONSTER or VEHICLE destroyed. +1VP if Wounds 10+. +1VP if Wounds 15+. +1VP if Wounds 20+. Max 8VP (Tactical). +1VP when achieved (Tactical)
cards.ENGAGE_ON_ALL_FRONTS: 4VP — units in 4 different table quarters more than 3" from any other quarter. 2VP if only 3 quarters. +1VP when achieved (Tactical, max 5VP). Non-Battle-shocked units only
cards.STORM_HOSTILE_OBJECTIVE: 4VP (Fixed) or 5VP (Tactical) — control objective marker that was opponent's at start of your turn, or opponent had none and you gained control of one you didn't have
cards.CLEANSE: Select units that give up shooting. At end of turn: 2VP/3VP for 1 objective cleansed (Fixed/Tactical), 4VP/5VP for 2+ (Fixed/Tactical)
cards.DEPLOY_TELEPORT_HOMER: 3VP centre of battlefield or 4VP/5VP opponent's deployment zone (Fixed/Tactical) — unit gives up shooting and ends in that location
cards.INVESTIGATE_SIGNALS: 2VP per corner scanned — units give up shooting and end wholly within 9" of corners
cards.DEFEND_STRONGHOLD: 3VP — at end of opponent's turn or battle end: control one or more objectives in your deployment zone
cards.OVERWHELMING_FORCE: 3VP each time enemy unit destroyed while within range of objective (max 5VP)
cards.SECURE_NO_MANS_LAND: 5VP — control 2+ objectives in No Man's Land. 2VP for 1 objective
cards.AREA_DENIAL: 5VP — unit in No Man's Land and no enemy within 6" of centre. 3VP if no enemy within 3" of centre
cards.A_TEMPTING_TARGET: 5VP — opponent selects objective in No Man's Land when drawn. Control it at end of your turn
cards.CAPTURE_ENEMY_OUTPOST: 8VP — control objective in opponent's deployment zone at end of your turn

gambits.when: End of third battle round — if Primary Mission VP <= opponent's VP
gambits.selection: Draw 3 Gambit cards (remove Proceed as Planned, shuffle rest, randomly discard one, re-add Proceed as Planned). Choose one secretly
gambits.proceedAsPlanned: Not attempting Gambit — continue scoring Primary Mission normally
gambits.ifAttempting: Cannot score more VP from Primary Mission (keep VP scored so far). Score Gambit VP at end of battle if successful

gambits.DELAYING_TACTICS: 30VP — at end of turn 5: half of enemy units within Engagement Range of your units must be successfully delayed (D6 per unit, 4+ = delayed, +1 if Battle-shocked, -1 if your unit Battle-shocked). Distraction target = half enemy units in Engagement Range (min 4)
gambits.EMERGENCY_EVACUATION: 30VP — at end of turn 5: units wholly within 6" of centre roll D6 (-1 if Battle-shocked), 4+ = marked for evacuation. Evacuation target = half your units on battlefield (min 4)
gambits.ORBITAL_STRIKE_COORDINATES: 30VP — at end of turn 5: units wholly within 9" of corners (not in own deployment zone, not Battle-shocked/Engaged). Roll 2D6, +1 per additional corner covered. 12+ = success
gambits.PROCEED_AS_PLANNED: Continue scoring Primary Mission as normal

missionRuleCards.HIDDEN_SUPPLIES: Set up one additional objective marker in No Man's Land. Shift centre marker 6" toward one corner; place new marker 6" toward opposite corner
missionRuleCards.CHOSEN_BATTLEFIELD: Players alternate placing objective markers (roll off for first). One in each deployment zone, rest in No Man's Land. More than 6" from edges, 9" from other markers
missionRuleCards.SCRAMBLER_FIELDS: Infiltrators cannot set up within range of objectives in No Man's Land or enemy deployment zone. Scouts cannot end within those ranges. Redeployed units cannot be set up within range of No Man's Land objectives. Reserves cannot set up within range of No Man's Land or enemy deployment zone objectives

primaryMissions.TAKE_AND_HOLD: From round 2: 5VP per objective controlled at end of Command phase (max 15VP per turn). Round 5 second player scores at end of turn instead
primaryMissions.PRIORITY_TARGETS: Rounds 2-5: 5VP per objective at end of Command phase (max 10VP). End of battle: 5VP per objective controlled (max 15VP)
primaryMissions.THE_RITUAL: Remove No Man's Land objectives except closest to centre. Each Shooting phase: select unit that gives up shooting to place objective 9" from another. Rounds 2-4: 5VP per No Man's Land objective controlled (max 15VP)
primaryMissions.SITES_OF_POWER: No Man's Land objectives are sites of power. Empowered by CHARACTER within range. 3VP per controlled objective + 3VP per empowered site (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.SCORCHED_EARTH: From round 2: unit gives up shooting to burn objective they control. 5VP per controlled objective (max 10VP). End of battle: 5VP if any No Man's Land burned, 10VP if enemy deployment zone burned
primaryMissions.SUPPLY_DROP: Randomly select Alpha and Omega objectives. Alpha removed start of round 4. All except Omega removed start of round 5. Scoring varies by round
primaryMissions.DEPLOY_SERVO_SKULLS: No Man's Land objectives as servo-skulls — can be moved 6" at end of each turn by controlling player. Score VP based on proximity to opponent's deployment zone
primaryMissions.VITAL_GROUND: Remove centre No Man's Land objective. 2VP own deployment, 5VP per No Man's Land, 6VP opponent's deployment (max 15VP per turn)
primaryMissions.PURGE_THE_FOE: 4VP if control objectives + 4VP if control more. 4VP if any enemy units destroyed that round + 4VP if more enemy than friendly destroyed

tournamentMissionPool.description: 15 pre-generated missions for tournament play. Prevents need to draw cards — use pre-set combinations
tournamentMissionPool.keyDifference: Models CAN end any type of move on top of objective markers in tournament play
tournamentMissionPool.objectiveMarkers: Treat as flat 40mm circular markers — no impediment to movement

terrainLayouts.primaryFeature: Ruins — efficiently blocks line of sight. Variety of heights important for Plunging Fire
terrainLayouts.noFixedMeasurements: Avoid precisely locked terrain — at least 4" between physical edges of each terrain feature

pairingCriteria: Win path (timing of wins and losses)
pairingsAndRankings.winPath: Players with same record paired by when they won/lost — prevents mismatched emotional states
